remarks: Welcome to this 3-bedroom home located on Haig Avenue in Stamford's highly desireable Springdale neighborhood. This home offes comfortable living spaces and plenty of flexibiliy to make it your own. The primary living level features beautiful hardwood floors that add timeless charm thoughout the main living areas and three bedrooms. The living room is filled with natual light and featues a fieplace that creates a cozy feel, and leads into the dining room. The main floor includes one full bath attached to the primary bedroom and a half bath. Additional living space is available in the lower level family room, which opens to the backyard throuh sliding doors. The basement also features a half bath and laundry. Attached to the basement is a spacious 2-car garage providing convenience and extra storage options year-round. Several updates have been completed including a roof that is approximately 2 years old and a brand new hot water heater. Conveniently located near shopping, parks, schools, and the Springdale train station, this home provides easy access to everything while still maintaining a quiet neighborhood feel. A great opportunity to own in one of Stamford's most sought-after communities!
